# AI & LLM Integration

| Tool | Level | Status |
|------|-------|--------|
| RAG Pipelines | Advanced | ⬜ Pending |
| Vector Embeddings (sentence-transformers) | Advanced | ⬜ Pending |
| MCP (Model Context Protocol) | Advanced | ⬜ Pending |
| LangChain | Intermediate | ⬜ Pending |
| GPT-4.0/4.1 / Claude Opus | Advanced | ⬜ Pending |

## Key Competencies

- RAG pipeline architecture for CI/CD log analysis
- Vector embeddings for contextual retrieval (sentence-transformers)
- MCP-based tool orchestration for automated diagnostics
- LLM-driven root cause analysis and recovery action generation
- Self-healing pipeline framework design
- Prompt engineering for contextual DevOps automation
